page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Deep learning tool for protein orthologous group assignment
page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepNOG is a tool for protein orthologous groups assignment. Assign proteins to orthologous groups (eggNOG 5) on CPUs or GPUs with deep networks. DeepNOG is much faster than alignment-based methods, providing accuracy similar to HMMER.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepNOG is a tool for protein orthologous groups assignment. Assign proteins to orthologous groups (eggNOG 5) on CPUs or GPUs with deep networks. DeepNOG is much faster than alignment-based methods, providing accuracy similar to HMMER.
